      has_greater := true;
    if TriangleArea(i, i + E_PTS + 1, i + E_PTS + F_PTS + 2) < AREA2 then
      has_less := true;
  end;
  EvaluateLIC15 := has_greater and has_less;
end;

procedure DECIDE;
var
  i, j: integer;
  all_true: boolean;
begin
  CMV[1] := EvaluateLIC1;
  CMV[2] := EvaluateLIC2;
  CMV[3] := EvaluateLIC3;
  CMV[4] := EvaluateLIC4;
  CMV[5] := EvaluateLIC5;
  CMV[6] := EvaluateLIC6;
  CMV[7] := EvaluateLIC7;
  CMV[8] := EvaluateLIC8;
  CMV[9] := EvaluateLIC9;
  CMV[10] := EvaluateLIC10;
  CMV[11] := EvaluateLIC11;
  CMV[12] := EvaluateLIC12;
  CMV[13] := EvaluateLIC13;
  CMV[14] := EvaluateLIC14;
  CMV[15] := EvaluateLIC15;

  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if i = j then
      begin
        PUM[i, j] := false;
      end
      else if LCM[i, j] = NOTUSED then
        PUM[i, j] := true
      else if LCM[i, j] = ANDD then
        PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] and CMV[j]
      else if LCM[i, j] = ORR then
        PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];
    end;
  end;

  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    all_true := true;
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if not PUM[i, j] then
        all_true := false;
    end;
    if (PUM[i, i] = false) or all_true then
      FUV[i] := true
    else
      FUV[i] := false;
  end;

  LAUNCH := true;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if not FUV[i] then
    begin
      LAUNCH := false;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function ExtractString(const S: string; var Pos: integer): string;
var
  Start: integer;
begin
  Pos := Pos + 1;
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] <> '"') do
    Inc(Pos);
  Result := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Inc(Pos);
end;

function ExtractNumber(const S: string; var Pos: integer): real;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Result := StrToFloat(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractInteger(const S: string; var Pos: integer): integer;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Result := StrToInt(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractBoolean(const S: string; var Pos: integer): boolean;
begin
  if Copy(S, Pos, 4) = 'true' then
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 4;
    Result := true;
  end
  else
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 5;
    Result := false;
  end;
end;

    if ParamStart <= Length(JSONStr) then

          'Q_PTS': Q_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'QUADS': QUADS := StrToInt(Val);
          'DIST': DIST := StrToFloat(Val);

    while (XStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[XStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(XStart);
    if XStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      idx := 1;
      NumStart := XStart + 1;
      while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
        Inc(NumStart);
      while NumStart <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E', ' ']) do
        begin
          if JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E'] then
            Inc(NumStart)
          else
            Break;
        end;
        if NumStart > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        NumEnd := NumStart;
        while (NumEnd <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumEnd] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
          Inc(NumEnd);
        if NumEnd > NumStart then
        begin
          X[idx] := StrToFloat(Copy(JSONStr, NumStart, NumEnd - NumStart));
          Inc(idx);
        end;
        NumStart := NumEnd;
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [',', ' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(NumStart);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  YStart := Pos('"y"', JSONStr);
  if YStart > 0 then
  begin
    YStart := YStart + 2;
    while (YStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[YStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(YStart);
    if YStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      idx := 1;
      NumStart := YStart + 1;
      while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
        Inc(NumStart);
      while NumStart <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E', ' ']) do
        begin
          if JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E'] then
            Inc(NumStart)
          else
            Break;
        end;
        if NumStart > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        NumEnd := NumStart;
        while (NumEnd <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumEnd] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
          Inc(NumEnd);
        if NumEnd > NumStart then
        begin
          Y[idx] := StrToFloat(Copy(JSONStr, NumStart, NumEnd - NumStart));
          Inc(idx);
        end;
        NumStart := NumEnd;
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [',', ' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(NumStart);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  LCMStart := Pos('"lcm"', JSONStr);
  if LCMStart > 0 then
  begin
    LCMStart := LCMStart + 5;
    while (LCMStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[LCMStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(LCMStart);
    if LCMStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      LCMIdx := 0;
      start := LCMStart + 1;
      while start <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> '"') do
          Inc(start);
        if start > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Key := ExtractString(JSONStr, start);
        
        if Key = 'NOTUSED' then
          LCM[LCMIdx div 15 + 1, LCMIdx mod 15 + 1] := NOTUSED
        else if Key = 'ORR' then
          LCM[LCMIdx div 15 + 1, LCMIdx mod 15 + 1] := ORR
        else if Key = 'ANDD' then
          LCM[LCMIdx div 15 + 1, LCMIdx mod 15 + 1] := ANDD;
        
        Inc(LCMIdx);
        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> ']') do
          Inc(start);
        if start <= Length(JSONStr) then Inc(start);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  PUMDiagStart := Pos('"pum_diag"', JSONStr);
  if PUMDiagStart > 0 then
  begin
    PUMDiagStart := PUMDiagStart + 10;
    while (PUMDiagStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[PUMDiagStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(PUMDiagStart);
    if PUMDiagStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      PUMIdx := 0;
      start := PUMDiagStart + 1;
      while start <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(start);
        if start > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        if JSONStr[start] = 't' then
        begin
          PUM[PUMIdx + 1, PUMIdx + 1] := true;
          Inc(PUMIdx);
          while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> ',') do
            Inc(start);
          if start <= Length(JSONStr) then Inc(start);
        end
        else if JSONStr[start] = 'f' then
        begin
          PUM[PUMIdx + 1, PUMIdx + 1] := false;
          Inc(PUMIdx);
          while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> ',') do
            Inc(start);
          if start <= Length(JSONStr) then Inc(start);
        end
        else
          Inc(start);
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function GenerateJSONOutput: string;
var
  i, j: integer;
  OutStr: string;
begin
  OutStr := '{"cmv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    if CMV[i] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"pum":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    OutStr := OutStr + '[';
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if j > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
      if PUM[i, j] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
    end;
    OutStr := OutStr + ']';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"fuv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    if FUV[i] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"launch":';
  if LAUNCH then
    OutStr := OutStr + 'true'
  else
    OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  OutStr := OutStr + '}';
  Result := OutStr;
end;

var
  InputStr: string;
  OutputStr: string;
  Line: string;
begin
  Line := '';
  while Readln(Line) do
    Line := Line + #10;
  if Length(Line) > 0 then
    Delete(Line, Length(Line), 1);
  InputStr := Line;

  ParseJSONInput(InputStr);
  DECIDE;
  OutputStr := GenerateJSONOutput;
  WriteLn(OutputStr);
end.
","after":"program LaunchInterceptor;

uses
  SysUtils;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  COMPTYPE = (LT, EQ, GT);
  CONNECTORS = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  COORDINATE = array[1..100] of real;
  CMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of boolean;
  VECTOR = array[1..15] of boolean;

var
  X, Y: COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS: integer;
  LENGTH1, RADIUS1, EPSILON, AREA1, DIST: real;
  Q_PTS, QUADS: integer;
  N_PTS, K_PTS, A_PTS, B_PTS, C_PTS, D_PTS, E_PTS, F_PTS, G_PTS: integer;
  LENGTH2, RADIUS2, AREA2: real;
  LCM: CMATRIX;
  PUM: BMATRIX;
  CMV: VECTOR;
  FUV: VECTOR;
  LAUNCH: boolean;
  InputData: string;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := 0.5 * Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i]));
end;

function Angle(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, mag1, mag2, dot, ang: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx1) + Sqr(dy1));
  mag2 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx2) + Sqr(dy2));
  if (mag1 = 0) or (mag2 = 0) then
  begin
    Angle := -1;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
  ang := ArcTan(dot / (mag1 * mag2));
  if ang < 0 then
    ang := -ang;
  Angle := ang;
end;

function CircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(j, k);
  b := Distance(i, k);
  c := Distance(i, j);
  if (a = 0) or (b = 0) or (c = 0) then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  s := (a + b + c) / 2;
  area := Sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));
  if area = 0 then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  CircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4 * area);
end;

function Quadrant(x, y: real): integer;
begin
  if (x > 0) and (y >= 0) then
    Quadrant := 1
  else if (x <= 0) and (y > 0) then
    Quadrant := 2
  else if (x < 0) and (y <= 0) then
    Quadrant := 3
  else
    Quadrant := 1;
end;

function EvaluateLIC1: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC1 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + 1) > LENGTH1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC1 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC2: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC2 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2) > RADIUS1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC2 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC3: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
begin
  EvaluateLIC3 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := Angle(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    if angle < 0 then
      continue;
    if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC3 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC4: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC4 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2) > AREA1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC4 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC5: boolean;
var
  i, quad_count, q1, q2, q3, q4: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC5 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    q1 := 0; q2 := 0; q3 := 0; q4 := 0;
    case Quadrant(X[i], Y[i]) of
      1: q1 := 1;
      2: q2 := 1;
      3: q3 := 1;
      4: q4 := 1;
    end;
    for j := 1 to Q_PTS - 1 do
      case Quadrant(X[i + j], Y[i + j]) of
        1: q1 := 1;
        2: q2 := 1;
        3: q3 := 1;
        4: q4 := 1;
      end;
    quad_count := q1 + q2 + q3 + q4;
    if quad_count > QUADS then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC5 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC6: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC6 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if X[i + 1] - X[i] < 0 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC6 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  if (dx = 0) and (dy = 0) then
  begin
    PointToLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  PointToLineDistance := num / Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
end;

function EvaluateLIC7: boolean;
var
  i, j: integer;
  max_dist: real;
begin
  EvaluateLIC7 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - N_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    max_dist := 0;
    for j := 0 to N_PTS - 1 do
      max_dist := Max(max_dist, PointToLineDistance(X[i + j], Y[i + j], X[i], Y[i], X[i + N_PTS - 1], Y[i + N_PTS - 1]));
    if max_dist > DIST then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC7 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC8: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC8 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - K_PTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + K_PTS + 1) > LENGTH1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC8 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC9: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC9 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - A_PTS - B_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + A_PTS + 1, i + A_PTS + B_PTS + 2) > RADIUS1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC9 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC10: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
begin
  EvaluateLIC10 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - C_PTS - D_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := Angle(i, i + C_PTS + 1, i + C_PTS + D_PTS + 2);
    if angle < 0 then
      continue;
    if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC10 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC11: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC11 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - E_PTS - F_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if TriangleArea(i, i + E_PTS + 1, i + E_PTS + F_PTS + 2) > AREA1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC11 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC12: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC12 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - G_PTS - 1 do
  begin
    if X[i + G_PTS + 1] - X[i] < 0 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC12 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC13: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  has_greater, has_less: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC13 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  has_greater := false;
  has_less := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - K_PTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + K_PTS + 1) > LENGTH1 then
      has_greater := true;
    if Distance(i, i + K_PTS + 1) < LENGTH2 then
      has_less := true;
  end;
  EvaluateLIC13 := has_greater and has_less;
end;

function EvaluateLIC14: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  has_outside, has_inside: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC14 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  has_outside := false;
  has_inside := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - A_PTS - B_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + A_PTS + 1, i + A_PTS + B_PTS + 2) > RADIUS1 then
      has_outside := true;
    if CircleRadius(i, i + A_PTS + 1, i + A_PTS + B_PTS + 2) <= RADIUS2 then
      has_inside := true;
  end;
  EvaluateLIC14 := has_outside and has_inside;
end;

function EvaluateLIC15: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  has_greater, has_less: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC15 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  has_greater := false;
  has_less := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - E_PTS - F_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if TriangleArea(i, i + E_PTS + 1, i + E_PTS + F_PTS + 2) > AREA1 then
      has_greater := true;
    if TriangleArea(i, i + E_PTS + 1, i + E_PTS + F_PTS + 2) < AREA2 then
      has_less := true;
  end;
  EvaluateLIC15 := has_greater and has_less;
end;

procedure DECIDE;
var
  i, j: integer;
  all_true: boolean;
begin
  CMV[1] := EvaluateLIC1;
  CMV[2] := EvaluateLIC2;
  CMV[3] := EvaluateLIC3;
  CMV[4] := EvaluateLIC4;
  CMV[5] := EvaluateLIC5;
  CMV[6] := EvaluateLIC6;
  CMV[7] := EvaluateLIC7;
  CMV[8] := EvaluateLIC8;
  CMV[9] := EvaluateLIC9;
  CMV[10] := EvaluateLIC10;
  CMV[11] := EvaluateLIC11;
  CMV[12] := EvaluateLIC12;
  CMV[13] := EvaluateLIC13;
  CMV[14] := EvaluateLIC14;
  CMV[15] := EvaluateLIC15;

  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if i = j then
      begin
        PUM[i, j] := false;
      end
      else if LCM[i, j] = NOTUSED then
        PUM[i, j] := true
      else if LCM[i, j] = ANDD then
        PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] and CMV[j]
      else if LCM[i, j] = ORR then
        PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];
    end;
  end;

  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    all_true := true;
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if not PUM[i, j] then
        all_true := false;
    end;
    if (PUM[i, i] = false) or all_true then
      FUV[i] := true
    else
      FUV[i] := false;
  end;

  LAUNCH := true;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if not FUV[i] then
    begin
      LAUNCH := false;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function ExtractString(const S: string; var Pos: integer): string;
var
  Start: integer;
begin
  Pos := Pos + 1;
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] <> '"') do
    Inc(Pos);
  Result := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Inc(Pos);
end;

function ExtractNumber(const S: string; var Pos: integer): real;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Result := StrToFloat(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractInteger(const S: string; var Pos: integer): integer;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Result := StrToInt(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractBoolean(const S: string; var Pos: integer): boolean;
begin
  if Copy(S, Pos, 4) = 'true' then
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 4;
    Result := true;
  end
  else
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 5;
    Result := false;
  end;
end;

procedure ParseJSONInput(const JSONStr: string);
var
  i, j, idx, start, endpos: integer;
  Key, Val, SubStr: string;
  LCMIdx: integer;
  PUMIdx: integer;
  ParamStart, ParamEnd: integer;
  LCMStart, LCMEnd: integer;
  PUMDiagStart, PUMDiagEnd: integer;
  XStart, XEnd: integer;
  YStart, YEnd: integer;
  NumStart, NumEnd: integer;
begin
  NUMPOINTS := 0;
  LCMIdx := 0;
  PUMIdx := 0;

  ParamStart := Pos('"parameters"', JSONStr);
  if ParamStart > 0 then
  begin
    ParamStart := ParamStart + 12;
    while (ParamStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[ParamStart] <> '{') do
      Inc(ParamStart);
    if ParamStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      start := ParamStart + 1;
      endpos := start;
      while endpos <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> '"') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if endpos > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Key := ExtractString(JSONStr, endpos);
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> ':') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if endpos > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Inc(endpos);
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(endpos);
        
        if JSONStr[endpos] = '"' then
          Val := ExtractString(JSONStr, endpos)
        else
          Val := FloatToStr(ExtractNumber(JSONStr, endpos));
        
        case Key of
          'LENGTH1': LENGTH1 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'RADIUS1': RADIUS1 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'EPSILON': EPSILON := StrToFloat(Val);
          'AREA1': AREA1 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'Q_PTS': Q_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'QUADS': QUADS := StrToInt(Val);
          'DIST': DIST := StrToFloat(Val);
          'N_PTS': N_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'K_PTS': K_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'A_PTS': A_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'B_PTS': B_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'C_PTS': C_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'D_PTS': D_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'E_PTS': E_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'F_PTS': F_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'G_PTS': G_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'LENGTH2': LENGTH2 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'RADIUS2': RADIUS2 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'AREA2': AREA2 := StrToFloat(Val);
        end;
        
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> '}') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if JSONStr[endpos] = '}' then Inc(endpos);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  XStart := Pos('"x"', JSONStr);
  if XStart > 0 then
  begin
    XStart := XStart + 2;
    while (XStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[XStart] <> '[') do

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1779807753562,"sessionID":"ses_19b338c69ffeaaZNJ7eI8r0F6A","part":{"id":"prt_e64ce70ea00101s87r8xCOr11d","messageID":"msg_e64ce6c6600153d7weUuNB0rSq","sessionID":"ses_19b338c69ffeaaZNJ7eI8r0F6A","type":"tool","tool":"write","callID":"call_9946c81fc2c146498406dc44","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"content":"program LaunchInterceptor;

uses
  SysUtils;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  COMPTYPE = (LT, EQ, GT);
  CONNECTORS = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  COORDINATE = array[1..100] of real;
  CMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of boolean;
  VECTOR = array[1..15] of boolean;

var
  X, Y: COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS: integer;
  LENGTH1, RADIUS1, EPSILON, AREA1, DIST: real;
  Q_PTS, QUADS: integer;
  N_PTS, K_PTS, A_PTS, B_PTS, C_PTS, D_PTS, E_PTS, F_PTS, G_PTS: integer;
  LENGTH2, RADIUS2, AREA2: real;

  PUM: BMATRIX;
  CMV: VECTOR;
  FUV: VECTOR;
  LAUNCH: boolean;
  InputData: string;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := 0.5 * Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i]));
end;

function Angle(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, mag1, mag2, dot, ang: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx1) + Sqr(dy1));
  mag2 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx2) + Sqr(dy2));
  if (mag1 = 0) or (mag2 = 0) then
  begin
    Angle := -1;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
  ang := ArcTan(dot / (mag1 * mag2));
  if ang < 0.0 then
    ang := -ang;
  Angle := ang;
end;

function CircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(j, k);
  b := Distance(i, k);
  c := Distance(i, j);
  if (a = 0) or (b = 0) or (c = 0) then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  s := (a + b + c) / 2;
  area := Sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));
  if area = 0.0 then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  CircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function Quadrant(x, y: real): integer;
begin
  if (x > 0) and (y >= 0) then
    Quadrant := 1
  else if (x <= 0) and (y > 0) then
    Quadrant := 2
  else if (x < 0) and (y <= 0) then
    Quadrant := 3
  else
    Quadrant := 1;
end;

function EvaluateLIC1: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC1 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + 1) > LENGTH1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC1 := true;

    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC2: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC2 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2) > RADIUS1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC2 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC3: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
begin
  EvaluateLIC3 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do

    angle := Angle(i, i + 1, i + 2);

    if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC3 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC4: boolean;
var

function EvaluateLIC5: boolean;
var
  i, quad_count, q1, q2, q3, q4: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC5 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - Q_PTS + 1 do

        4: q4 := 1;
      end;
    quad_count := q1 + q2 + q3 + q4;
    if quad_count > QUADS then

      EvaluateLIC5 := true;

    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC6: boolean;
var

begin

function PointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  if (dx = 0.0) and (dy = 0.0) then
  begin
    PointToLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  PointToLineDistance := num / Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
end;

function EvaluateLIC7: boolean;
var
  i, j: integer;

begin
  EvaluateLIC7 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - N_PTS + 1 do

    for j := 0 to N_PTS - 1 do

    if max_dist > DIST then

      EvaluateLIC7 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC8: boolean;

function ExtractString(const S: string; var Pos: integer): string;
var
  Start: integer;
begin
  Pos := Pos + 1;
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] <> '"') do
    Inc(Pos);
  Result := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Inc(Pos);
end;

function ExtractNumber(const S: string; var Pos: integer): real;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Result := StrToFloat(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractInteger(const S: string; var Pos: integer): integer;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Result := StrToInt(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractBoolean(const S: string; var Pos: integer): boolean;
begin
  if Copy(S, Pos, 4) = 'true' then
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 4;
    Result := true;
  end
  else
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 5;
    Result := false;
  end;
end;

procedure ParseJSONInput(const JSONStr: string);

      Inc(YStart);
    if YStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      idx := 1;
      NumStart := YStart + 1;
      while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do

      while NumStart <= Length(JSONStr) do

    if LCMStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      LCMIdx := 0;
      start := LCMStart + 1;
      while start <= Length(JSONStr) do

        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> '"') do

function GenerateJSONOutput: string;

      if PUM[i, j] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';

  else
    OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  OutStr := OutStr + '}';
  Result := OutStr;

  ParseJSONInput(InputStr);
  DECIDE;
  OutputStr := GenerateJSONOutput;
  WriteLn(OutputStr);
end.

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := 0.5 * Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i]));
end;

function Angle(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, mag1, mag2, dot, ang: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx1) + Sqr(dy1));
  mag2 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx2) + Sqr(dy2));
  if (mag1 = 0) or (mag2 = 0) then
  begin
    Angle := -1;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
  ang := ArcTan(dot / (mag1 * mag2));
  if ang < 0.0 then
    ang := -ang;
  Angle := ang;
end;

function CircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(j, k);
  b := Distance(i, k);
  c := Distance(i, j);
  if (a = 0) or (b = 0) or (c = 0) then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  s := (a + b + c) / 2;
  area := Sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));
  if area = 0.0 then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  CircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function Quadrant(x, y: real): integer;
begin
  if (x > 0) and (y >= 0) then
    Quadrant := 1
  else if (x <= 0) and (y > 0) then
    Quadrant := 2
  else if (x < 0) and (y <= 0) then
    Quadrant := 3
  else
    Quadrant := 1;
end;

function EvaluateLIC1: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC1 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + 1) > LENGTH1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC1 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC2: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2) > RADIUS1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC2 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC3: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
  skip: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC3 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := Angle(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    skip := false;
    if angle < 0.0 then
      skip := true;
    if not skip then
    begin
      if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
      begin
        EvaluateLIC3 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC4: boolean;
var

    if TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2) > AREA1 then

function EvaluateLIC5: boolean;
var
  i, quad_count, q1, q2, q3, q4: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC5 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    q1 := 0; q2 := 0; q3 := 0; q4 := 0;
    case Quadrant(X[i], Y[i]) of
      1: q1 := 1;
      2: q2 := 1;
      3: q3 := 1;
      4: q4 := 1;
    end;
    for j := 1 to Q_PTS - 1 do
      case Quadrant(X[i + j], Y[i + j]) of
        1: q1 := 1;
        2: q2 := 1;
        3: q3 := 1;
        4: q4 := 1;
      end;
    quad_count := q1 + q2 + q3 + q4;
    if quad_count > QUADS then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC5 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC6: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC6 := false;

function PointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  if (dx = 0.0) and (dy = 0.0) then
  begin
    PointToLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  PointToLineDistance := num / Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
end;

function EvaluateLIC7: boolean;
var
  i, j: integer;
  max_dist: real;
begin
  EvaluateLIC7 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - N_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    max_dist := 0.0;
    for j := 0 to N_PTS - 1 do
      max_dist := Max(max_dist, PointToLineDistance(X[i + j], Y[i + j], X[i], Y[i], X[i + N_PTS - 1], Y[i + N_PTS - 1]));
    if max_dist > DIST then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC7 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if i = j then
      begin
        PUM[i, j] := false;
      end
      else if LCM[i, j] = NOTUSED then
        PUM[i, j] := true
      else if LCM[i, j] = ANDD then
        PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] and CMV[j]
      else if LCM[i, j] = ORR then
        PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];
    end;
  end;

  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    all_true := true;
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if not PUM[i, j] then
        all_true := false;
    end;
    if (PUM[i, i] = false) or all_true then
      FUV[i] := true
    else

  end;

  for i := 1 to 15 do

    if not FUV[i] then

      LAUNCH := false;
      Exit;
    end;

function ExtractString(const S: string; var Pos: integer): string;
var
  Start: integer;
begin
  Pos := Pos + 1;
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] <> '"') do
    Inc(Pos);
  Result := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Inc(Pos);
end;

function ExtractNumber(const S: string; var Pos: integer): real;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Result := StrToFloat(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractInteger(const S: string; var Pos: integer): integer;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Result := StrToInt(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractBoolean(const S: string; var Pos: integer): boolean;
begin
  if Copy(S, Pos, 4) = 'true' then
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 4;
    Result := true;
  end
  else
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 5;
    Result := false;
  end;
end;

procedure ParseJSONInput(const JSONStr: string);
var
  i, j, idx, start, endpos: integer;

  LCMIdx: integer;

  YStart, YEnd: integer;
  NumStart, NumEnd: integer;
begin
  NUMPOINTS := 0;
  LCMIdx := 0;
  PUMIdx := 0;

  ParamStart := Pos('"parameters"', JSONStr);
  if ParamStart > 0 then
  begin
    ParamStart := ParamStart + 12;
    while (ParamStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[ParamStart] <> '{') do
      Inc(ParamStart);
    if ParamStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      start := ParamStart + 1;
      endpos := start;
      while endpos <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> '"') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if endpos > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Key := ExtractString(JSONStr, endpos);
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> ':') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if endpos > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Inc(endpos);
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(endpos);
        
        if JSONStr[endpos] = '"' then
          Val := ExtractString(JSONStr, endpos)
        else
          Val := FloatToStr(ExtractNumber(JSONStr, endpos));
        
        case Key of
          'LENGTH1': LENGTH1 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'RADIUS1': RADIUS1 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'EPSILON': EPSILON := StrToFloat(Val);
          'AREA1': AREA1 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'Q_PTS': Q_PTS := StrToInt(Val);

          'B_PTS': B_PTS := StrToInt(Val);

          'G_PTS': G_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'LENGTH2': LENGTH2 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'RADIUS2': RADIUS2 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'AREA2': AREA2 := StrToFloat(Val);
        end;
        
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> '}') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if JSONStr[endpos] = '}' then Inc(endpos);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  XStart := Pos('"x"', JSONStr);
  if XStart > 0 then
  begin
    XStart := XStart + 2;
    while (XStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[XStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(XStart);
    if XStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      idx := 1;
      NumStart := XStart + 1;
      while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
        Inc(NumStart);

      begin
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E', ' ']) do
        begin
          if JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E'] then
            Inc(NumStart)
          else
            Break;
        end;
        if NumStart > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        NumEnd := NumStart;
        while (NumEnd <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumEnd] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
          Inc(NumEnd);
        if NumEnd > NumStart then
        begin
          X[idx] := StrToFloat(Copy(JSONStr, NumStart, NumEnd - NumStart));
          Inc(idx);
        end;
        NumStart := NumEnd;
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [',', ' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(NumStart);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  YStart := Pos('"y"', JSONStr);
  if YStart > 0 then
  begin
    YStart := YStart + 2;
    while (YStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[YStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(YStart);
    if YStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      idx := 1;
      NumStart := YStart + 1;
      while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
        Inc(NumStart);
      while NumStart <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E', ' ']) do
        begin
          if JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E'] then
            Inc(NumStart)
          else
            Break;
        end;
        if NumStart > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        NumEnd := NumStart;
        while (NumEnd <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumEnd] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
          Inc(NumEnd);
        if NumEnd > NumStart then
        begin
          Y[idx] := StrToFloat(Copy(JSONStr, NumStart, NumEnd - NumStart));
          Inc(idx);
        end;
        NumStart := NumEnd;
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [',', ' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(NumStart);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  LCMStart := Pos('"lcm"', JSONStr);
  if LCMStart > 0 then
  begin
    LCMStart := LCMStart + 5;
    while (LCMStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[LCMStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(LCMStart);
    if LCMStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      LCMIdx := 0;
      start := LCMStart + 1;
      while start <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> '"') do
          Inc(start);
        if start > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Key := ExtractString(JSONStr, start);
        
        if Key = 'NOTUSED' then
          LCM[LCMIdx div 15 + 1, LCMIdx mod 15 + 1] := NOTUSED
        else if Key = 'ORR' then
          LCM[LCMIdx div 15 + 1, LCMIdx mod 15 + 1] := ORR
        else if Key = 'ANDD' then
          LCM[LCMIdx div 15 + 1, LCMIdx mod 15 + 1] := ANDD;
        
        Inc(LCMIdx);
        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> ']') do
          Inc(start);
        if start <= Length(JSONStr) then Inc(start);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  PUMDiagStart := Pos('"pum_diag"', JSONStr);
  if PUMDiagStart > 0 then
  begin
    PUMDiagStart := PUMDiagStart + 10;
    while (PUMDiagStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[PUMDiagStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(PUMDiagStart);
    if PUMDiagStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      PUMIdx := 0;
      start := PUMDiagStart + 1;
      while start <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(start);
        if start > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        if JSONStr[start] = 't' then
        begin
          PUM[PUMIdx + 1, PUMIdx + 1] := true;
          Inc(PUMIdx);
          while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> ',') do
            Inc(start);
          if start <= Length(JSONStr) then Inc(start);
        end
        else if JSONStr[start] = 'f' then
        begin
          PUM[PUMIdx + 1, PUMIdx + 1] := false;
          Inc(PUMIdx);
          while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> ',') do
            Inc(start);
          if start <= Length(JSONStr) then Inc(start);
        end
        else
          Inc(start);
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function GenerateJSONOutput: string;
var
  i, j: integer;

uses

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  COMPTYPE = (LT, EQ, GT);

  COORDINATE = array[1..100] of real;
  CMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of boolean;
  VECTOR = array[1..15] of boolean;

var
  X, Y: COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS: integer;
  LENGTH1, RADIUS1, EPSILON, AREA1, DIST: real;
  Q_PTS, QUADS: integer;
  N_PTS, K_PTS, A_PTS, B_PTS, C_PTS, D_PTS, E_PTS, F_PTS, G_PTS: integer;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := 0.5 * Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i]));
end;

function CalcAngle(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, mag1, mag2, dot, ang: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx1) + Sqr(dy1));
  mag2 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx2) + Sqr(dy2));
  if (mag1 = 0) or (mag2 = 0) then
  begin
    CalcAngle := -1;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
  ang := ArcTan(dot / (mag1 * mag2));
  if ang < 0.0 then
    ang := -ang;
  CalcAngle := ang;
end;

function CircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(j, k);
  b := Distance(i, k);
  c := Distance(i, j);
  if (a = 0) or (b = 0) or (c = 0) then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  s := (a + b + c) / 2;
  area := Sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));
  if area = 0.0 then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  CircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function Quadrant(x, y: real): integer;
begin
  if (x > 0) and (y >= 0) then
    Quadrant := 1
  else if (x <= 0) and (y > 0) then
    Quadrant := 2
  else if (x < 0) and (y <= 0) then
    Quadrant := 3
  else
    Quadrant := 1;
end;

function EvaluateLIC1: boolean;
var

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do

    if Distance(i, i + 1) > LENGTH1 then

    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC2: boolean;

function EvaluateLIC3: boolean;

function EvaluateLIC5: boolean;

        3: q3 := 1;
        4: q4 := 1;
      end;
    quad_count := q1 + q2 + q3 + q4;
    if quad_count > QUADS then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC5 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  if (dx = 0.0) and (dy = 0.0) then
  begin
    PointToLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  PointToLineDistance := num / Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
end;

  COORDINATE = array[1..100] of real;
  CMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of boolean;
  VECTOR = array[1..15] of boolean;

var
  X, Y: COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS: integer;
  LENGTH1, RADIUS1, EPSILON, AREA1, DIST: real;
  Q_PTS, QUADS: integer;
  N_PTS, K_PTS, A_PTS, B_PTS, C_PTS, D_PTS, E_PTS, F_PTS, G_PTS: integer;
  LENGTH2, RADIUS2, AREA2: real;
  LCM: CMATRIX;
  PUM: BMATRIX;
  CMV: VECTOR;
  FUV: VECTOR;
  LAUNCH: boolean;
  InputData: string;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := 0.5 * Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i]));
end;

function CalcAngle(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, mag1, mag2, dot, ang: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx1) + Sqr(dy1));
  mag2 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx2) + Sqr(dy2));
  if (mag1 = 0) or (mag2 = 0) then
  begin
    CalcAngle := -1;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
  ang := ArcTan(dot / (mag1 * mag2));
  if ang < 0.0 then
    ang := -ang;
  CalcAngle := ang;
end;

function CircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(j, k);
  b := Distance(i, k);
  c := Distance(i, j);
  if (a = 0) or (b = 0) or (c = 0) then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  s := (a + b + c) / 2;
  area := Sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));
  if area = 0.0 then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  CircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function Quadrant(x, y: real): integer;
begin
  if (x > 0) and (y >= 0) then
    Quadrant := 1
  else if (x <= 0) and (y > 0) then
    Quadrant := 2
  else if (x < 0) and (y <= 0) then
    Quadrant := 3
  else
    Quadrant := 1;
end;

function EvaluateLIC1: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC1 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + 1) > LENGTH1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC1 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC2: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC2 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2) > RADIUS1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC2 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC3: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
  skip: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC3 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := CalcAngle(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    skip := false;
    if angle < 0.0 then
      skip := true;
    if not skip then
    begin
      if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
      begin
        EvaluateLIC3 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC4: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC4 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2) > AREA1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC4 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC5: boolean;
var
  i, quad_count, q1, q2, q3, q4: integer;
  j: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC5 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    q1 := 0; q2 := 0; q3 := 0; q4 := 0;
    case Quadrant(X[i], Y[i]) of
      1: q1 := 1;
      2: q2 := 1;
      3: q3 := 1;
      4: q4 := 1;
    end;
    for j := 1 to Q_PTS - 1 do
      case Quadrant(X[i + j], Y[i + j]) of
        1: q1 := 1;
        2: q2 := 1;
        3: q3 := 1;
        4: q4 := 1;
      end;
    quad_count := q1 + q2 + q3 + q4;
    if quad_count > QUADS then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC5 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC6: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC6 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if X[i + 1] - X[i] < 0.0 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC6 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  if (dx = 0.0) and (dy = 0.0) then
  begin
    PointToLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  PointToLineDistance := num / Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
end;

function EvaluateLIC7: boolean;
var
  i, j: integer;
  max_dist: real;
begin
  EvaluateLIC7 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - N_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    max_dist := 0.0;
    for j := 0 to N_PTS - 1 do
      max_dist := Max(max_dist, PointToLineDistance(X[i + j], Y[i + j], X[i], Y[i], X[i + N_PTS - 1], Y[i + N_PTS - 1]));
    if max_dist > DIST then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC7 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC8: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC8 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - K_PTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + K_PTS + 1) > LENGTH1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC8 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC9: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC9 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - A_PTS - B_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + A_PTS + 1, i + A_PTS + B_PTS + 2) > RADIUS1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC9 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC10: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
  skip: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC10 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - C_PTS - D_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := CalcAngle(i, i + C_PTS + 1, i + C_PTS + D_PTS + 2);
    skip := false;
    if angle < 0.0 then
      skip := true;
    if not skip then
    begin
      if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
      begin
        EvaluateLIC10 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC11: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC11 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - E_PTS - F_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if TriangleArea(i, i + E_PTS + 1, i + E_PTS + F_PTS + 2) > AREA1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC11 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC12: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC12 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - G_PTS - 1 do
  begin
    if X[i + G_PTS + 1] - X[i] < 0.0 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC12 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC13: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  has_greater, has_less: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC13 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  has_greater := false;
  has_less := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - K_PTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + K_PTS + 1) > LENGTH1 then
      has_greater := true;
    if Distance(i, i + K_PTS + 1) < LENGTH2 then
      has_less := true;
  end;
  EvaluateLIC13 := has_greater and has_less;
end;

function EvaluateLIC14: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  has_outside, has_inside: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC14 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  has_outside := false;
  has_inside := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - A_PTS - B_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + A_PTS + 1, i + A_PTS + B_PTS + 2) > RADIUS1 then
      has_outside := true;
    if CircleRadius(i, i + A_PTS + 1, i + A_PTS + B_PTS + 2) <= RADIUS2 then
      has_inside := true;
  end;
  EvaluateLIC14 := has_outside and has_inside;
end;

function EvaluateLIC15: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  has_greater, has_less: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC15 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  has_greater := false;
  has_less := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - E_PTS - F_PTS - 2 do
  begin
    if TriangleArea(i, i + E_PTS + 1, i + E_PTS + F_PTS + 2) > AREA1 then
      has_greater := true;
    if TriangleArea(i, i + E_PTS + 1, i + E_PTS + F_PTS + 2) < AREA2 then
      has_less := true;
  end;
  EvaluateLIC15 := has_greater and has_less;
end;

procedure DECIDE;
var
  i, j: integer;
  all_true: boolean;
begin
  CMV[1] := EvaluateLIC1;
  CMV[2] := EvaluateLIC2;
  CMV[3] := EvaluateLIC3;
  CMV[4] := EvaluateLIC4;
  CMV[5] := EvaluateLIC5;
  CMV[6] := EvaluateLIC6;
  CMV[7] := EvaluateLIC7;
  CMV[8] := EvaluateLIC8;
  CMV[9] := EvaluateLIC9;
  CMV[10] := EvaluateLIC10;
  CMV[11] := EvaluateLIC11;
  CMV[12] := EvaluateLIC12;
  CMV[13] := EvaluateLIC13;
  CMV[14] := EvaluateLIC14;
  CMV[15] := EvaluateLIC15;

  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if i = j then
      begin
        PUM[i, j] := false;
      end
      else if LCM[i, j] = NOTUSED then
        PUM[i, j] := true
      else if LCM[i, j] = ANDD then
        PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] and CMV[j]
      else if LCM[i, j] = ORR then
        PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];
    end;
  end;

  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    all_true := true;
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if not PUM[i, j] then
        all_true := false;
    end;
    if (PUM[i, i] = false) or all_true then
      FUV[i] := true
    else
      FUV[i] := false;
  end;

  LAUNCH := true;
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if not FUV[i] then
    begin
      LAUNCH := false;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function ExtractString(const S: string; var Pos: integer): string;
var
  Start: integer;
begin
  Pos := Pos + 1;
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] <> '"') do
    Inc(Pos);
  ExtractString := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Inc(Pos);
end;

function ExtractNumber(const S: string; var Pos: integer): real;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  ExtractNumber := StrToFloat(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractInteger(const S: string; var Pos: integer): integer;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  ExtractInteger := StrToInt(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractBoolean(const S: string; var Pos: integer): boolean;
begin
  if Copy(S, Pos, 4) = 'true' then
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 4;
    ExtractBoolean := true;
  end
  else
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 5;
    ExtractBoolean := false;
  end;
end;

procedure ParseJSONInput(const JSONStr: string);
var
  i, j, idx, start, endpos: integer;
  Key, Val: string;
  LCMIdx: integer;
  PUMIdx: integer;
  ParamStart: integer;
  LCMStart: integer;
  PUMDiagStart: integer;
  XStart: integer;
  YStart: integer;
  NumStart, NumEnd: integer;
begin
  NUMPOINTS := 0;
  LCMIdx := 0;
  PUMIdx := 0;

  ParamStart := Pos('"parameters"', JSONStr);
  if ParamStart > 0 then
  begin
    ParamStart := ParamStart + 12;
    while (ParamStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[ParamStart] <> '{') do
      Inc(ParamStart);
    if ParamStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      start := ParamStart + 1;
      endpos := start;
      while endpos <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> '"') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if endpos > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Key := ExtractString(JSONStr, endpos);
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> ':') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if endpos > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Inc(endpos);
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(endpos);
        
        if JSONStr[endpos] = '"' then
          Val := ExtractString(JSONStr, endpos)
        else
          Val := FloatToStr(ExtractNumber(JSONStr, endpos));
        
        case Key of
          'LENGTH1': LENGTH1 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'RADIUS1': RADIUS1 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'EPSILON': EPSILON := StrToFloat(Val);
          'AREA1': AREA1 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'Q_PTS': Q_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'QUADS': QUADS := StrToInt(Val);
          'DIST': DIST := StrToFloat(Val);
          'N_PTS': N_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'K_PTS': K_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'A_PTS': A_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'B_PTS': B_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'C_PTS': C_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'D_PTS': D_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'E_PTS': E_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'F_PTS': F_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'G_PTS': G_PTS := StrToInt(Val);
          'LENGTH2': LENGTH2 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'RADIUS2': RADIUS2 := StrToFloat(Val);
          'AREA2': AREA2 := StrToFloat(Val);
        end;
        
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> '}') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if JSONStr[endpos] = '}' then Inc(endpos);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  XStart := Pos('"x"', JSONStr);
  if XStart > 0 then
  begin
    XStart := XStart + 2;
    while (XStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[XStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(XStart);
    if XStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      idx := 1;
      NumStart := XStart + 1;
      while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
        Inc(NumStart);
      while NumStart <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E', ' ']) do
        begin
          if JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E'] then
            Inc(NumStart)
          else
            Break;
        end;
        if NumStart > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        NumEnd := NumStart;
        while (NumEnd <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumEnd] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
          Inc(NumEnd);
        if NumEnd > NumStart then
        begin
          X[idx] := StrToFloat(Copy(JSONStr, NumStart, NumEnd - NumStart));
          Inc(idx);
        end;
        NumStart := NumEnd;
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [',', ' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(NumStart);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  YStart := Pos('"y"', JSONStr);
  if YStart > 0 then
  begin
    YStart := YStart + 2;
    while (YStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[YStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(YStart);
    if YStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      idx := 1;
      NumStart := YStart + 1;
      while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
        Inc(NumStart);
      while NumStart <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E', ' ']) do
        begin
          if JSONStr[NumStart] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E'] then
            Inc(NumStart)
          else
            Break;
        end;
        if NumStart > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        NumEnd := NumStart;
        while (NumEnd <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumEnd] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
          Inc(NumEnd);
        if NumEnd > NumStart then
        begin
          Y[idx] := StrToFloat(Copy(JSONStr, NumStart, NumEnd - NumStart));
          Inc(idx);
        end;
        NumStart := NumEnd;
        while (NumStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[NumStart] in [',', ' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(NumStart);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  LCMStart := Pos('"lcm"', JSONStr);
  if LCMStart > 0 then
  begin
    LCMStart := LCMStart + 5;
    while (LCMStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[LCMStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(LCMStart);
    if LCMStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      LCMIdx := 0;
      start := LCMStart + 1;
      while start <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> '"') do
          Inc(start);
        if start > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Key := ExtractString(JSONStr, start);
        
        if Key = 'NOTUSED' then
          LCM[LCMIdx div 15 + 1, LCMIdx mod 15 + 1] := NOTUSED
        else if Key = 'ORR' then
          LCM[LCMIdx div 15 + 1, LCMIdx mod 15 + 1] := ORR
        else if Key = 'ANDD' then
          LCM[LCMIdx div 15 + 1, LCMIdx mod 15 + 1] := ANDD;
        
        Inc(LCMIdx);
        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> ']') do
          Inc(start);
        if start <= Length(JSONStr) then Inc(start);
      end;
    end;
  end;

  PUMDiagStart := Pos('"pum_diag"', JSONStr);
  if PUMDiagStart > 0 then
  begin
    PUMDiagStart := PUMDiagStart + 10;
    while (PUMDiagStart <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[PUMDiagStart] <> '[') do
      Inc(PUMDiagStart);
    if PUMDiagStart <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      PUMIdx := 0;
      start := PUMDiagStart + 1;
      while start <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] in [' ', '\t', '\n', '\r']) do
          Inc(start);
        if start > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        if JSONStr[start] = 't' then
        begin
          PUM[PUMIdx + 1, PUMIdx + 1] := true;
          Inc(PUMIdx);
          while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> ',') do
            Inc(start);
          if start <= Length(JSONStr) then Inc(start);
        end
        else if JSONStr[start] = 'f' then
        begin
          PUM[PUMIdx + 1, PUMIdx + 1] := false;
          Inc(PUMIdx);
          while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> ',') do
            Inc(start);
          if start <= Length(JSONStr) then Inc(start);
        end
        else
          Inc(start);
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function GenerateJSONOutput: string;
var
  i, j: integer;
  OutStr: string;
begin
  OutStr := '{"cmv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    if CMV[i] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"pum":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    OutStr := OutStr + '[';
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if j > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
      if PUM[i, j] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
    end;
    OutStr := OutStr + ']';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"fuv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    if FUV[i] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"launch":';
  if LAUNCH then
    OutStr := OutStr + 'true'
  else
    OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  OutStr := OutStr + '}';
  GenerateJSONOutput := OutStr;
end;

var
  InputStr: string;
  OutputStr: string;
  Line: string;
begin
  Line := '';
  while Readln(Line) do
    Line := Line + #10;
  if Length(Line) > 0 then
    Delete(Line, Length(Line), 1);
  InputStr := Line;

  ParseJSONInput(InputStr);
  DECIDE;
  OutputStr := GenerateJSONOutput;
  WriteLn(OutputStr);
end.

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1779808013878,"sessionID":"ses_19b338c69ffeaaZNJ7eI8r0F6A","part":{"id":"prt_e64d2681b001cTaPMu5Rkcsclf","messageID":"msg_e64d262440015g3IsMtIzFVDNc","sessionID":"ses_19b338c69ffeaaZNJ7eI8r0F6A","type":"tool","tool":"write","callID":"call_dc0a413828584cab82e6a605","state":{"status":"error","input":{"content":"program LaunchInterceptor;

uses
  SysUtils;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  COMPTYPE = (LT, EQ, GT);
  CONNECTORS = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  COORDINATE = array[1..100] of real;
  CMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of boolean;
  VECTOR = array[1..15] of boolean;

var
  X, Y: COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS: integer;
  LENGTH1, RADIUS1, EPSILON, AREA1, DIST: real;
  Q_PTS, QUADS: integer;
  N_PTS, K_PTS, A_PTS, B_PTS, C_PTS, D_PTS, E_PTS, F_PTS, G_PTS: integer;
  LENGTH2, RADIUS2, AREA2: real;
  LCM: CMATRIX;
  PUM: BMATRIX;
  CMV: VECTOR;
  FUV: VECTOR;
  LAUNCH: boolean;
  InputData: string;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function MaxReal(a, b: real): real;
begin
  if a > b then
    MaxReal := a
  else
    MaxReal := b;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := 0.5 * Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i]));
end;

function CalcAngle(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, mag1, mag2, dot, ang: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx1) + Sqr(dy1));
  mag2 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx2) + Sqr(dy2));
  if (mag1 = 0) or (mag2 = 0) then
  begin
    CalcAngle := -1;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
  ang := ArcTan(dot / (mag1 * mag2));
  if ang < 0.0 then
    ang := -ang;
  CalcAngle := ang;
end;

function CircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(j, k);
  b := Distance(i, k);
  c := Distance(i, j);
  if (a = 0) or (b = 0) or (c = 0) then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  s := (a + b + c) / 2;
  area := Sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));
  if area = 0.0 then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  CircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function Quadrant(x, y: real): integer;
begin
  if (x > 0) and (y >= 0) then
    Quadrant := 1
  else if (x <= 0) and (y > 0) then
    Quadrant := 2
  else if (x < 0) and (y <= 0) then
    Quadrant := 3
  else
    Quadrant := 1;
end;

function EvaluateLIC1: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC1 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + 1) > LENGTH1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC1 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC2: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC2 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2) > RADIUS1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC2 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC3: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
  skip: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC3 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := CalcAngle(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    skip := false;
    if angle < 0.0 then
      skip := true;
    if not skip then
    begin
      if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
      begin
        EvaluateLIC3 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC4: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC4 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2) > AREA1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC4 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC5: boolean;
var
  i, quad_count, q1, q2, q3, q4: integer;
  j: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC5 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    q1 := 0; q2 := 0; q3 := 0; q4 := 0;
    case Quadrant(X[i], Y[i]) of
      1: q1 := 1;
      2: q2 := 1;
      3: q3 := 1;
      4: q4 := 1;
    end;
    for j := 1 to Q_PTS - 1 do
      case Quadrant(X[i + j], Y[i + j]) of
        1: q1 := 1;
        2: q2 := 1;
        3: q3 := 1;
        4: q4 := 1;
      end;
    quad_count := q1 + q2 + q3 + q4;
    if quad_count > QUADS then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC5 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC6: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC6 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if X[i + 1] - X[i] < 0.0 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC6 := true;
      Exit;

  end;
end;

function PointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  if (dx = 0.0) and (dy = 0.0) then
  begin
    PointToLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  PointToLineDistance := num / Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
end;

function EvaluateLIC7: boolean;
var
  i, j: integer;
  max_dist: real;
  dist_val: real;
begin
  EvaluateLIC7 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - N_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    max_dist := 0.0;
    for j := 0 to N_PTS - 1 do
    begin
      dist_val := PointToLineDistance(X[i + j], Y[i + j], X[i], Y[i], X[i + N_PTS - 1], Y[i + N_PTS - 1]);
      if dist_val > max_dist then
        max_dist := dist_val;
    end;
    if max_dist > DIST then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC7 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC8: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC8 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - K_PTS - 1 do

function EvaluateLIC9: boolean;

begin

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - A_PTS - B_PTS - 2 do

begin

  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - C_PTS - D_PTS - 2 do

      if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then

function EvaluateLIC11: boolean;

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - E_PTS - F_PTS - 2 do

    if TriangleArea(i, i + E_PTS + 1, i + E_PTS + F_PTS + 2) > AREA1 then

function EvaluateLIC12: boolean;

begin

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - G_PTS - 1 do

    if X[i + G_PTS + 1] - X[i] < 0.0 then

function EvaluateLIC13: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  has_greater, has_less: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC13 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 3 then
    Exit;
  has_greater := false;
  has_less := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - K_PTS - 1 do

    if Distance(i, i + K_PTS + 1) < LENGTH2 then

  end;
  EvaluateLIC13 := has_greater and has_less;
end;

function EvaluateLIC14: boolean;
var
  i: integer;

begin
  EvaluateLIC14 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then
    Exit;
  has_outside := false;
  has_inside := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - A_PTS - B_PTS - 2 do

    if CircleRadius(i, i + A_PTS + 1, i + A_PTS + B_PTS + 2) > RADIUS1 then

    if CircleRadius(i, i + A_PTS + 1, i + A_PTS + B_PTS + 2) <= RADIUS2 then

  EvaluateLIC14 := has_outside and has_inside;

function EvaluateLIC15: boolean;
var
  i: integer;

begin
  EvaluateLIC15 := false;
  if NUMPOINTS < 5 then

procedure DECIDE;
var

begin

function ExtractString(const S: string; var Pos: integer): string;
var
  Start: integer;
begin
  Pos := Pos + 1;
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] <> '"') do
    Inc(Pos);
  ExtractString := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Inc(Pos);
end;

function ExtractNumber(const S: string; var Pos: integer): real;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  ExtractNumber := StrToFloat(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractInteger(const S: string; var Pos: integer): integer;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  ExtractInteger := StrToInt(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractBoolean(const S: string; var Pos: integer): boolean;
begin
  if Copy(S, Pos, 4) = 'true' then
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 4;
    ExtractBoolean := true;
  end
  else
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 5;
    ExtractBoolean := false;
  end;
end;

uses

const

  VECTOR = array[1..15] of boolean;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function MaxReal(a, b: real): real;
begin
  if a > b then
    MaxReal := a
  else
    MaxReal := b;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := 0.5 * Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i]));
end;

function CalcAngle(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, mag1, mag2, dot, ang: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx1) + Sqr(dy1));
  mag2 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx2) + Sqr(dy2));
  if (mag1 = 0) or (mag2 = 0) then
  begin
    CalcAngle := -1;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
  ang := ArcTan(dot / (mag1 * mag2));
  if ang < 0.0 then
    ang := -ang;
  CalcAngle := ang;
end;

function CircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(j, k);
  b := Distance(i, k);
  c := Distance(i, j);
  if (a = 0) or (b = 0) or (c = 0) then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  s := (a + b + c) / 2;
  area := Sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));
  if area = 0.0 then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  CircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function Quadrant(x, y: real): integer;
begin
  if (x > 0) and (y >= 0) then
    Quadrant := 1
  else if (x <= 0) and (y > 0) then
    Quadrant := 2
  else if (x < 0) and (y <= 0) then
    Quadrant := 3
  else
    Quadrant := 1;
end;

function EvaluateLIC1: boolean;

function EvaluateLIC2: boolean;

  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do

    if CircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2) > RADIUS1 then

      EvaluateLIC2 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC3: boolean;
var

begin
  EvaluateLIC3 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do

    angle := CalcAngle(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    skip := false;
    if angle < 0.0 then
      skip := true;
    if not skip then
    begin
      if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
      begin
        EvaluateLIC3 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC4: boolean;
var

begin
  EvaluateLIC4 := false;

function EvaluateLIC5: boolean;
var
  i, quad_count, q1, q2, q3, q4: integer;
  j: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC5 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    q1 := 0; q2 := 0; q3 := 0; q4 := 0;
    case Quadrant(X[i], Y[i]) of
      1: q1 := 1;
      2: q2 := 1;
      3: q3 := 1;
      4: q4 := 1;
    end;
    for j := 1 to Q_PTS - 1 do
      case Quadrant(X[i + j], Y[i + j]) of
        1: q1 := 1;
        2: q2 := 1;
        3: q3 := 1;
        4: q4 := 1;
      end;
    quad_count := q1 + q2 + q3 + q4;
    if quad_count > QUADS then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC5 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  if (dx = 0.0) and (dy = 0.0) then
  begin
    PointToLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  PointToLineDistance := num / Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
end;

function EvaluateLIC7: boolean;

      dist_val := PointToLineDistance(X[i + j], Y[i + j], X[i], Y[i], X[i + N_PTS - 1], Y[i + N_PTS - 1]);
      if dist_val > max_dist then
        max_dist := dist_val;
    end;

var

    begin
      if i = j then

      else if LCM[i, j] = NOTUSED then
        PUM[i, j] := true
      else if LCM[i, j] = ANDD then

        PUM[i, j] := CMV[i] or CMV[j];

    all_true := true;

end;

function ExtractString(const S: string; var Pos: integer): string;
var
  Start: integer;
begin
  Pos := Pos + 1;
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] <> '"') do
    Inc(Pos);
  ExtractString := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Inc(Pos);
end;

function ExtractNumber(const S: string; var Pos: integer): real;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-', '.', '+', 'e', 'E']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  ExtractNumber := StrToFloat(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractInteger(const S: string; var Pos: integer): integer;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] in ['0'..'9', '-']) do
    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  ExtractInteger := StrToInt(NumStr);
end;

function ExtractBoolean(const S: string; var Pos: integer): boolean;
begin
  if Copy(S, Pos, 4) = 'true' then
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 4;
    ExtractBoolean := true;
  end
  else
  begin
    Pos := Pos + 5;
    ExtractBoolean := false;
  end;
end;

        while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> '"') do

    OutStr := OutStr + 'true'
  else
    OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  OutStr := OutStr + '}';
  GenerateJSONOutput := OutStr;

  WriteLn(OutputStr);
end.

function GenerateJSONOutput: string;
var
  i, j: integer;
  OutStr: string;
begin
  OutStr := '{"cmv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    if CMV[i] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"pum":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    OutStr := OutStr + '[';
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if j > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
      if PUM[i, j] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
    end;
    OutStr := OutStr + ']';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"fuv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    if FUV[i] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"launch":';
  if LAUNCH then
    OutStr := OutStr + 'true'
  else
    OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  OutStr := OutStr + '}';
  GenerateJSONOutput := OutStr;
end;

var
  InputStr: string;
  OutputStr: string;
  Line: string;
begin
  Line := '';
  while Readln(Line) do
    Line := Line + #10;
  if Length(Line) > 0 then
    Delete(Line, Length(Line), 1);
  InputStr := Line;

  ParseJSONInput(InputStr);
  DECIDE;
  OutputStr := GenerateJSONOutput;
  WriteLn(OutputStr);
end.
