function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function MaxReal(a, b: real): real;
begin
  if a > b then
    MaxReal := a
  else
    MaxReal := b;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := 0.5 * Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i]));
end;

function CalcAngle(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, mag1, mag2, dot, ang: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx1) + Sqr(dy1));
  mag2 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx2) + Sqr(dy2));
  if (mag1 = 0) or (mag2 = 0) then
  begin
    CalcAngle := -1;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
  ang := ArcTan(dot / (mag1 * mag2));
  if ang < 0.0 then
    ang := -ang;
  CalcAngle := ang;
end;

function CircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(j, k);
  b := Distance(i, k);
  c := Distance(i, j);
  if (a = 0) or (b = 0) or (c = 0) then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  s := (a + b + c) / 2;
  area := Sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));
  if area = 0.0 then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  CircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function Quadrant(x, y: real): integer;
begin
  if (x > 0) and (y >= 0) then
    Quadrant := 1
  else if (x <= 0) and (y > 0) then
    Quadrant := 2
  else if (x < 0) and (y <= 0) then
    Quadrant := 3
  else
    Quadrant := 1;
end;

function EvaluateLIC1: boolean;
var

function EvaluateLIC3: boolean;

      if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
      begin
        EvaluateLIC3 := true;

    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC4: boolean;

function EvaluateLIC5: boolean;

begin

function PointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  if (dx = 0.0) and (dy = 0.0) then
  begin
    PointToLineDistance := Sqrt(Sqr(px - x1) + Sqr(py - y1));
    Exit;
  end;
  num := Abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1);
  PointToLineDistance := num / Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
end;

function EvaluateLIC7: boolean;

function ExtractString(const S: string; var Pos: integer): string;
var
  Start: integer;
begin
  Pos := Pos + 1;
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] <> '"') do
    Inc(Pos);
  ExtractString := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Inc(Pos);
end;

function ExtractNumber(const S: string; var Pos: integer): real;
var
  Start: integer;
  NumStr: string;
begin
  Start := Pos;

    Inc(Pos);
  NumStr := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  ExtractNumber := StrToFloat(NumStr);
end;

function GenerateJSONOutput: string;
var
  i, j: integer;
  OutStr: string;
begin
  OutStr := '{"cmv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    if CMV[i] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"pum":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    OutStr := OutStr + '[';
    for j := 1 to 15 do
    begin
      if j > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
      if PUM[i, j] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
    end;
    OutStr := OutStr + ']';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"fuv":[';
  for i := 1 to 15 do
  begin
    if i > 1 then OutStr := OutStr + ',';
    if FUV[i] then OutStr := OutStr + 'true' else OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  end;
  OutStr := OutStr + '],"launch":';
  if LAUNCH then
    OutStr := OutStr + 'true'
  else
    OutStr := OutStr + 'false';
  OutStr := OutStr + '}';
  GenerateJSONOutput := OutStr;
end;

var
  InputStr: string;
  OutputStr: string;
  Line: string;
begin
  Line := '';
  while not Eof do
  begin
    Readln(Line);
    Line := Line + #10;
  end;
  if Length(Line) > 0 then
    Delete(Line, Length(Line), 1);
  InputStr := Line;

  ParseJSONInput(InputStr);
  DECIDE;
  OutputStr := GenerateJSONOutput;
  WriteLn(OutputStr);
end.

program TestParse;
uses SysUtils;

function ExtractString(const S: string; var Pos: integer): string;
var
  Start: integer;
begin
  Pos := Pos + 1;
  Start := Pos;
  while (Pos <= Length(S)) and (S[Pos] <> '"') do
    Inc(Pos);
  ExtractString := Copy(S, Start, Pos - Start);
  Inc(Pos);
end;

procedure ParseJSONInput(const JSONStr: string);
var
  start, endpos: integer;
  Key, Val: string;
  Ch: char;
begin
  WriteLn('Parsing: ', JSONStr);
  WriteLn('Length: ', Length(JSONStr));
  
  start := Pos('"parameters"', JSONStr);
  WriteLn('parameters pos: ', start);
  if start > 0 then
  begin
    start := start + 12;
    while (start <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[start] <> '{') do
      Inc(start);
    WriteLn('brace pos: ', start);
    if start <= Length(JSONStr) then
    begin
      endpos := start + 1;
      WriteLn('Starting loop from: ', endpos);
      while endpos <= Length(JSONStr) do
      begin
        WriteLn('endpos: ', endpos, ' char: ', JSONStr[endpos]);
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> '"') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if endpos > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Key := ExtractString(JSONStr, endpos);
        WriteLn('Key: ', Key);
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> ':') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if endpos > Length(JSONStr) then Break;
        Inc(endpos);
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) do
        begin
          Ch := JSONStr[endpos];
          if (Ch <> ' ') and (Ch <> #9) and (Ch <> #10) and (Ch <> #13) then
            Break;
          Inc(endpos);
        end;
        
        if JSONStr[endpos] = '"' then
          Val := ExtractString(JSONStr, endpos)
        else
          Val := FloatToStr(StrToFloat(JSONStr[endpos]));
        
        WriteLn('Val: ', Val);
        
        while (endpos <= Length(JSONStr)) and (JSONStr[endpos] <> '}') do
          Inc(endpos);
        if JSONStr[endpos] = '}' then Inc(endpos);
        WriteLn('After value, endpos: ', endpos);
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

var
  InputStr: string;
  Line: string;
begin
  Line := '';
  while not Eof do
  begin
    Readln(Line);
  end;
  InputStr := Line;
  ParseJSONInput(InputStr);
end.
ENDOFFILE

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1779808595172,"sessionID":"ses_19b338c69ffeaaZNJ7eI8r0F6A","part":{"id":"prt_e64db1de8001KfjtT1RnX7qHZ3","messageID":"msg_e64dae9b0001auIU3rwrRmFhzP","sessionID":"ses_19b338c69ffeaaZNJ7eI8r0F6A","type":"tool","tool":"write","callID":"call_494ab89fe17940199d682cbb","state":{"status":"error","input":{"content":"program LaunchInterceptor;

uses
  SysUtils;

const
  PI = 3.1415926535;

type
  COMPTYPE = (LT, EQ, GT);
  CONNECTORS = (NOTUSED, ORR, ANDD);
  COORDINATE = array[1..100] of real;
  CMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of CONNECTORS;
  BMATRIX = array[1..15, 1..15] of boolean;
  VECTOR = array[1..15] of boolean;

var
  X, Y: COORDINATE;
  NUMPOINTS: integer;
  LENGTH1, RADIUS1, EPSILON, AREA1, DIST: real;
  Q_PTS, QUADS: integer;
  N_PTS, K_PTS, A_PTS, B_PTS, C_PTS, D_PTS, E_PTS, F_PTS, G_PTS: integer;
  LENGTH2, RADIUS2, AREA2: real;
  LCM: CMATRIX;
  PUM: BMATRIX;
  CMV: VECTOR;
  FUV: VECTOR;
  LAUNCH: boolean;
  InputData: string;
  StreamPos: integer;

function REALCOMPARE(A, B: real): COMPTYPE;
var
  scale, eps, diff: real;
begin
  scale := Abs(A);
  if Abs(B) > scale then
    scale := Abs(B);
  if scale = 0.0 then
  begin
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
    Exit;
  end;

  eps := 0.5e-5 * scale;
  diff := A - B;
  if diff > eps then
    REALCOMPARE := GT
  else if diff < -eps then
    REALCOMPARE := LT
  else
    REALCOMPARE := EQ;
end;

function MaxReal(a, b: real): real;
begin
  if a > b then
    MaxReal := a
  else
    MaxReal := b;
end;

function Distance(i, j: integer): real;
begin
  Distance := Sqrt(Sqr(X[i] - X[j]) + Sqr(Y[i] - Y[j]));
end;

function TriangleArea(i, j, k: integer): real;
begin
  TriangleArea := 0.5 * Abs((X[j] - X[i]) * (Y[k] - Y[i]) - (X[k] - X[i]) * (Y[j] - Y[i]));
end;

function CalcAngle(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2, mag1, mag2, dot, ang: real;
begin
  dx1 := X[i] - X[j];
  dy1 := Y[i] - Y[j];
  dx2 := X[k] - X[j];
  dy2 := Y[k] - Y[j];
  mag1 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx1) + Sqr(dy1));
  mag2 := Sqrt(Sqr(dx2) + Sqr(dy2));
  if (mag1 = 0) or (mag2 = 0) then
  begin
    CalcAngle := -1;
    Exit;
  end;
  dot := dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
  ang := ArcTan(dot / (mag1 * mag2));
  if ang < 0.0 then
    ang := -ang;
  CalcAngle := ang;
end;

function CircleRadius(i, j, k: integer): real;
var
  a, b, c, s, area: real;
begin
  a := Distance(j, k);
  b := Distance(i, k);
  c := Distance(i, j);
  if (a = 0) or (b = 0) or (c = 0) then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  s := (a + b + c) / 2;
  area := Sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));
  if area = 0.0 then
  begin
    CircleRadius := 0;
    Exit;
  end;
  CircleRadius := (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area);
end;

function Quadrant(x, y: real): integer;
begin
  if (x > 0) and (y >= 0) then
    Quadrant := 1
  else if (x <= 0) and (y > 0) then
    Quadrant := 2
  else if (x < 0) and (y <= 0) then
    Quadrant := 3
  else
    Quadrant := 1;
end;

function EvaluateLIC1: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC1 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if Distance(i, i + 1) > LENGTH1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC1 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC2: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC2 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if CircleRadius(i, i + 1, i + 2) > RADIUS1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC2 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC3: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
  angle: real;
  skip: boolean;
begin
  EvaluateLIC3 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    angle := CalcAngle(i, i + 1, i + 2);
    skip := false;
    if angle < 0.0 then
      skip := true;
    if not skip then
    begin
      if (angle < (PI - EPSILON)) or (angle > (PI + EPSILON)) then
      begin
        EvaluateLIC3 := true;
        Exit;
      end;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC4: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC4 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 2 do
  begin
    if TriangleArea(i, i + 1, i + 2) > AREA1 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC4 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC5: boolean;
var
  i, quad_count, q1, q2, q3, q4: integer;
  j: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC5 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - Q_PTS + 1 do
  begin
    q1 := 0; q2 := 0; q3 := 0; q4 := 0;
    case Quadrant(X[i], Y[i]) of
      1: q1 := 1;
      2: q2 := 1;
      3: q3 := 1;
      4: q4 := 1;
    end;
    for j := 1 to Q_PTS - 1 do
      case Quadrant(X[i + j], Y[i + j]) of
        1: q1 := 1;
        2: q2 := 1;
        3: q3 := 1;
        4: q4 := 1;
      end;
    quad_count := q1 + q2 + q3 + q4;
    if quad_count > QUADS then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC5 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function EvaluateLIC6: boolean;
var
  i: integer;
begin
  EvaluateLIC6 := false;
  for i := 1 to NUMPOINTS - 1 do
  begin
    if X[i + 1] - X[i] < 0.0 then
    begin
      EvaluateLIC6 := true;
      Exit;
    end;
  end;
end;

function PointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2: real): real;
var
  dx, dy, num: real;
begin
  dx := x2 - x1;
  dy := y2 - y1;
  if (dx = 0.0) and (dy = 0.0) then
  begin

  PointToLineDistance := num / Sqrt(Sqr(dx) + Sqr(dy));
end;

program TestJSON;
uses SysUtils;

var
  InputData: string;
  StreamPos: integer;

procedure SkipWhitespace;
begin
  while (StreamPos <= Length(InputData)) and (InputData[StreamPos] in [' ', #9, #10, #13]) do
    Inc(StreamPos);
end;

function PeekChar: char;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if StreamPos > Length(InputData) then
    Result := #0
  else
    Result := InputData[StreamPos];
end;

function ReadChar: char;
var
  Ch: char;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  if StreamPos > Length(InputData) then
    Result := #0
  else
  begin
    Result := InputData[StreamPos];
    Inc(StreamPos);
  end;
end;

function ReadNumber: real;
var
  NumStr: string;
  Sign: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  Sign := 1;
  if InputData[StreamPos] = '-' then
  begin
    Sign := -1;
    Inc(StreamPos);
  end
  else if InputData[StreamPos] = '+' then
    Inc(StreamPos);

  NumStr := '';
  while (StreamPos <= Length(InputData)) and (InputData[StreamPos] in ['0'..'9', '.', 'e', 'E', '+', '-']) do
  begin
    NumStr := NumStr + InputData[StreamPos];
    Inc(StreamPos);
  end;

  Result := StrToFloat(NumStr) * Sign;
end;

function ReadInteger: integer;
var
  NumStr: string;
  Sign: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  Sign := 1;
  if InputData[StreamPos] = '-' then
  begin
    Sign := -1;
    Inc(StreamPos);
  end
  else if InputData[StreamPos] = '+' then
    Inc(StreamPos);

  NumStr := '';
  while (StreamPos <= Length(InputData)) and (InputData[StreamPos] in ['0'..'9']) do
  begin
    NumStr := NumStr + InputData[StreamPos];
    Inc(StreamPos);
  end;

  Result := StrToInt(NumStr) * Sign;
end;

function ReadString: string;
var
  Ch: char;
begin
  Ch := ReadChar;
  if Ch <> '"' then
    Exit;
  Result := '';
  while (StreamPos <= Length(InputData)) and (InputData[StreamPos] <> '"') do
  begin
    if InputData[StreamPos] = '\' then
    begin
      Inc(StreamPos);
      if StreamPos <= Length(InputData) then
        Result := Result + InputData[StreamPos];
    end
    else
      Result := Result + InputData[StreamPos];
    Inc(StreamPos);
  end;
  if StreamPos <= Length(InputData) then
    Inc(StreamPos);
end;

function ReadBoolean: boolean;
var
  Word: string;
  i: integer;
begin
  SkipWhitespace;
  Word := '';
  while (StreamPos <= Length(InputData)) and (InputData[StreamPos] in ['a'..'z', 'A'..'Z']) do
  begin
    Word := Word + LowerCase(InputData[StreamPos]);
    Inc(StreamPos);
  end;
  Result := Word = 'true';
end;

procedure ReadArray;
var
  Ch: char;
  idx: integer;
begin
  Ch := ReadChar;
  if Ch <> '[' then
    Exit;
  idx := 1;
  while True do
  begin
    SkipWhitespace;
    Ch := PeekChar;
    if Ch = ']' then
    begin
      ReadChar;
      Break;
    end;
    if Ch in ['0'..'9', '-', '+', '.'] then
    begin
      WriteLn('Reading number: ', ReadNumber);
      Inc(idx);
    end;
    SkipWhitespace;
    Ch := PeekChar;
    if Ch = ',' then
      ReadChar;
  end;
end;

procedure ReadObject;
var
  Ch: char;
  Key: string;
begin
  Ch := ReadChar;
  if Ch <> '{' then
  begin
    WriteLn('Expected {, got: ', Ch);
    Exit;
  end;
  WriteLn('Started object');
  while True do
  begin
    SkipWhitespace;
    Ch := PeekChar;
    if Ch = '}' then
    begin
      ReadChar;
      Break;
    end;
    Key := ReadString;
    WriteLn('Key: ', Key);
    SkipWhitespace;
    Ch := ReadChar;
    if Ch = ':' then
    begin
      SkipWhitespace;
      Ch := PeekChar;
      WriteLn('Value char: ', Ch);
      if Ch = '{' then
      begin
        WriteLn('Nested object');
        ReadObject;
      end
      else if Ch = '[' then
      begin
        WriteLn('Array');
        ReadArray;
      end
      else if Ch in ['0'..'9', '-', '.'] then
      begin
        WriteLn('Number: ', ReadNumber);
      end
      else if Ch = '"' then
      begin
        WriteLn('String: ', ReadString);
      end
      else if Ch = 't' or Ch = 'f' then
      begin
        WriteLn('Boolean: ', ReadBoolean);
      end
      else
        Inc(StreamPos);
    end;
    SkipWhitespace;
    Ch := PeekChar;
    if Ch = ',' then
      ReadChar;
  end;
  WriteLn('Ended object');
end;

procedure ParseJSONInput(const JSONStr: string);
begin
  InputData := JSONStr;
  StreamPos := 1;
  ReadObject;
end;

var
  InputStr: string;
  Line: string;
begin
  Line := '';
  while not Eof do
  begin
    Readln(Line);
  end;
  InputStr := Line;
  ParseJSONInput(InputStr);
  WriteLn('Done');
end.
ENDOFFILE

import json
import math

PI = 3.1415926535

def realcompare(a, b):
    scale = max(abs(a), abs(b))
    if scale == 0.0:
        return 'EQ'
    eps = 0.5e-5 * scale
    diff = a - b
    if diff > eps:
        return 'GT'
    elif diff < -eps:
        return 'LT'
    else:
        return 'EQ'

def distance(x1, y1, x2, y2):
    return math.sqrt((x2-x1)**2 + **(y2-y1)2)

def triangle_area(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3):
    return 0.5 * abs((x2 - x1) * (y3 - y1) - (x3 - x1) * (y2 - y1))

def calc_angle(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3):
    dx1, dy1 = x1 - x2, y1 - y2
    dx2, dy2 = x3 - x2, y3 - y2
    mag1 = math.sqrt(dx1**2 + dy1**2)
    mag2 = math.sqrt(dx2**2 + dy2**2)
    if mag1 == 0 or mag2 == 0:
        return -1
    dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2
    ang = math.atan2(dot, mag1 * mag2)
    if ang < 0:
        ang = -ang
    return ang

def circle_radius(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3):
    a = distance(x2, y2, x3, y3)
    b = distance(x1, y1, x3, y3)
    c = distance(x1, y1, x2, y2)
    if a == 0 or b == 0 or c == 0:
        return 0
    s = (a + b + c) / 2
    area = math.sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c))
    if area == 0:
        return 0
    return (a * b * c) / (4 * area)

def quadrant(x, y):
    if x > 0 and y >= 0:
        return 1
    elif x <= 0 and y > 0:
        return 2
    elif x < 0 and y <= 0:
        return 3
    else:
        return 1

def point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2):
    dx, dy = x2 - x1, y2 - y1
    if dx == 0 and dy == 0:
        return math.sqrt((px - x1)**2 + **(py - y1)2)
    num = abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1)
    return num / math.sqrt(dx**2 + dy**2)

import json
import math

PI = 3.1415926535

def distance(x1, y1, x2, y2):
    return math.sqrt((x2-x1)**2 + **(y2-y1)2)

def triangle_area(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3):
    return 0.5 * abs((x2 - x1) * (y3 - y1) - (x3 - x1) * (y2 - y1))

def calc_angle(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3):
    dx1, dy1 = x1 - x2, y1 - y2
    dx2, dy2 = x3 - x2, y3 - y2
    mag1 = math.sqrt(dx1**2 + dy1**2)
    mag2 = math.sqrt(dx2**2 + dy2**2)
    if mag1 == 0 or mag2 == 0:
        return -1
    dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2
    ang = math.atan2(dot, mag1 * mag2)
    if ang < 0:
        ang = -ang
    return ang

def circle_radius(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3):
    a = distance(x2, y2, x3, y3)
    b = distance(x1, y1, x3, y3)
    c = distance(x1, y1, x2, y2)
    if a == 0 or b == 0 or c == 0:
        return 0
    s = (a + b + c) / 2
    area = math.sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c))
    if area == 0:
        return 0
    return (a * b * c) / (4 * area)

def quadrant(x, y):
    if x > 0 and y >= 0:
        return 1
    elif x <= 0 and y > 0:
        return 2
    elif x < 0 and y <= 0:
        return 3
    else:
        return 1

def point_to_line_distance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2):
    dx, dy = x2 - x1, y2 - y1
    if dx == 0 and dy == 0:
        return math.sqrt((px - x1)**2 + **(py - y1)2)
    num = abs(dy * px - dx * py + x2 * y1 - y2 * x1)
    return num / math.sqrt(dx**2 + dy**2)

def triangle_area(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3):
    return 0.5 * abs((x2 - x1) * (y3 - y1) - (x3 - x1) * (y2 - y1))

def calc_angle(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3):
    dx1, dy1 = x1 - x2, y1 - y2
    dx2, dy2 = x3 - x2, y3 - y2
    mag1 = math.sqrt(dx1**2 + dy1**2)
    mag2 = math.sqrt(dx2**2 + dy2**2)
    if mag1 == 0 or mag2 == 0:
        return -1
    dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2
    ang = math.atan2(dot, mag1 * mag2)
    if ang < 0:
        ang = -ang
    return ang

def circle_radius(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3):
    a = distance(x2, y2, x3, y3)
    b = distance(x1, y1, x3, y3)
    c = distance(x1, y1, x2, y2)
    if a == 0 or b == 0 or c == 0:
        return 0
    s = (a + b + c) / 2
    area = math.sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c))
    if area == 0:
        return 0
    return (a * b * c) / (4 * area)

def quadrant(x, y):
    if x > 0 and y >= 0:
        return 1
    elif x <= 0 and y > 0:
        return 2
    elif x < 0 and y <= 0:
        return 3
    else:
